title: Outlook/Email Integration with Overview widget
excerpt: It would be great idea in the Overview widget can be integrated with Outlook to send out custom emails that holds a snapshot of the Overview dashboard at custom intervals. This helps to send report to senior level employ…

posts.author: rajeev (rajeev)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great idea in the Overview widget can be integrated with Outlook to send out custom emails that holds a snapshot of the Overview dashboard at custom intervals. This helps to send report to senior level employees that don’t really want to log into other websites/applications but would appreciate the brief status of the current projects.
